067_croatia_minus1_away_win.translation: 克罗地亚真实平/负，即加纳不败

068_panama_plus2_home_win.translation: 巴拿马真实胜/平，或英格兰只赢1球

068_panama_plus2_away_win.translation: 英格兰真实赢3球或以上

069_colombia_plus1_home_win_draw.translation: 哥伦比亚真实胜/平，或葡萄牙只赢1球

070_drc_minus1_home_win.translation: 刚果金真实赢2球或以上

071_algeria_ordinary_home_or_away.translation: 阿尔及利亚胜或奥地利胜，排除平局

072_jordan_plus2_home_win.translation: 约旦真实胜/平，或阿根廷只赢1球

tickets.stake_review: acceptable only as discussion reference; if combined with R3/R5, reduce to 10-12
tickets.main_risk: Three legs all lean toward favorites not covering or underdogs resisting; this is not independent diversification.

tickets.stake_review: too high for current 75 budget; prefer 8-10 discussion reference
leg_relationships: 069 哥伦比亚(+1)主胜平: wide handicap protection
070 刚果金(-1)主平: exact one-goal path, no clear edge
071 阿尔及利亚胜/奥地利胜: anti-draw leg, conflicts with strong market draw signal
tickets.main_risk: R2 contains one wide-protection leg, one exact-margin leg, and one anti-draw leg where market draw is very high; the structure is not stable enough for 16.

tickets.stake_review: reduce to 10-16 discussion reference; 30 is 40% of budget and too much for exact-margin entertainment
tickets.main_risk: All legs are exact-margin corridors around 21-26%; 6x4 spreads the risk better than 6-leg all串, but it is still a concentrated exact-margin thesis.

tickets.stake_review: 12 can only be a theoretical discussion amount; no executable or payout wording because exact-score odds are missing
tickets.translation_check: handicap_leg_correct; exact-score legs need same-source odds before valuation
leg_relationships: 067 克罗地亚(-1)客胜: Ghana resistance path
约旦 0-1/0-2: Argentina low-score win cluster
巴拿马 0-2/0-3/0-4: England 2+ to 4+ score cluster; 0-3 is in model top5, 0-4 is blowout tail
tickets.main_risk: Exact score parlay variance is very high; without same-source exact-score odds, risk/reward cannot be evaluated.

tickets.stake_review: keep only as 5-8, at most 10, discussion reference; not a main allocation
leg_relationships: 068 巴拿马(+2)客胜: England 3+ blowout tail; model 18.85%, market appears much hotter at 41.58%
070 刚果金(-1)主胜: DR Congo 2+ must-win tail; model 24.44%, no clear market edge
071 奥地利胜: slight model delta but draw market warning
tickets.main_risk: R5 is coherent as a strong-team/necessary-win blowout branch, especially after adding big-score tail thinking, but the first two legs are not obvious value at current market-implied prices.

portfolio_advice.recommended_file_action: Add R1-R5 as a bold-plan review appendix or separate file; do not overwrite the existing standard 75-yuan plan.

if_using_75_discussion_budget.R4: observation_only; no payout without exact-score odds
if_using_75_discussion_budget.reserve_or_wait: remaining budget should stay as wait/skip because gates are not clear

portfolio_advice.r3_vs_six_leg_all_parlay: 6x4 is materially more reasonable than a 6-leg all串 because it allows two exact-margin legs to fail, but 30 yuan is still too much for a low-probability exact-margin thesis.
